com.pax.poslink

Class PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
  • Enclosing class:
    PaymentRequest.CommercialCard

    public static class PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.LineItemDetail
extends java.lang.Object

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      java.lang.String ItemCommodityCode
      Line item commodity code.
      The international description code used to classify the item purchased.
      java.lang.String ItemDescription
      Specific description of the item purchased and related to the commodity code.
      java.lang.String ItemDiscountAmount
      Discount amount applied to the item purchased.
      Includes 2 implied decimals.
      java.lang.String ItemDiscountRate
      The rate at which the item is discounted.
      java.lang.String ItemMeasurementUnit
      The unit of measure code, refer to unit of measure sheet.
      java.lang.String ItemQuantity
      This field represents the number of units of the item purchased.
      For TSYS: Includes 4 implied decimals.
      For TransIT: No implied decimals.
      java.lang.String ItemSequenceNumber
      Line item sequence number.
      java.lang.String ItemUnitPrice
      The unit price of the item purchased.
      java.lang.String LineItemTotal
      Unit cost multiplied by the quantity and less the discount per line item.
      [Unit Price * Quantity]-Discount Per Line Item = Line Item Total.
      java.lang.String ProductCode
      Line item product code.
      e.g.
      java.util.List<PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail> TaxDetails
      An array of PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      LineItemDetail() 

    • Method Summary

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Field Detail

      • ItemSequenceNumber

        public java.lang.String ItemSequenceNumber
        Line item sequence number.
        The value must be incremented sequentially. Mandatory when any of below fields present.

        Attribute: n..3

      • ProductCode

        public java.lang.String ProductCode
        Line item product code.
        e.g. the Universal Product Code (UPC)

        Attribute: ans..12

      • ItemCommodityCode

        public java.lang.String ItemCommodityCode
        Line item commodity code.
        The international description code used to classify the item purchased. Required for Visa level 3 transactions and optional for MasterCard level 3 transactions.

        Attribute: ans..12

      • ItemDescription

        public java.lang.String ItemDescription
        Specific description of the item purchased and related to the commodity code.

        Attribute: ans..35

      • ItemQuantity

        public java.lang.String ItemQuantity
        This field represents the number of units of the item purchased.
        For TSYS: Includes 4 implied decimals.
        For TransIT: No implied decimals.

        Attribute: n..12

      • ItemMeasurementUnit

        public java.lang.String ItemMeasurementUnit
        The unit of measure code, refer to unit of measure sheet.

        Attribute: ans..12

      • ItemUnitPrice

        public java.lang.String ItemUnitPrice
        The unit price of the item purchased.
        For TSYS: Includes 4 implied decimals.
        For TransIT: Includes 2 implied decimals.

        Attribute: n..9

      • ItemDiscountAmount

        public java.lang.String ItemDiscountAmount
        Discount amount applied to the item purchased.
        Includes 2 implied decimals.

        Attribute: n..9

      • ItemDiscountRate

        public java.lang.String ItemDiscountRate
        The rate at which the item is discounted. Includes 2 implied decimals.

        Attribute: n..5

      • TaxDetails

        public java.util.List<PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail> TaxDetails
        An array of PaymentRequest.CommercialCard.TaxDetail

      • LineItemTotal

        public java.lang.String LineItemTotal
        Unit cost multiplied by the quantity and less the discount per line item.
        [Unit Price * Quantity]-Discount Per Line Item = Line Item Total. Includes 2 implied decimal.

        Attribute: n..12

    • Constructor Detail

      • LineItemDetail

        public LineItemDetail()
